uploadDocuments.title: Upload Documents
uploadDocuments.description: Upload your passport, bank statement, and other required documents

qualityCheck.title: Quality Check & Finalize
qualityCheck.description: AI review for common refusal triggers, then generate your PDF

submitVfs.title: Submit at VFS
submitVfs.description: Book your VFS appointment and submit your documents

bookAppointment.title: Book your VFS appointment
bookAppointment.description: Schedule your visa submission appointment at VFS Global. Apply at least {min}–{max} business days before your travel date.
bookAppointment.disclaimer: VisaAgent does not book appointments on your behalf.

vfs.biometrics: First-time Schengen visa applicants will provide fingerprints at the VFS centre.

whatNext.title: What happens next
whatNext.approvedDescription: Collect your passport from the VFS centre or receive it by courier (if you opted for courier delivery).
whatNext.refusedDescription: You will receive a letter explaining the grounds for refusal. You may reapply with stronger documentation or appeal the decision.
